column1: Left-axis area: Urban and rural residents (1) health consumption, (2) non-material consumption, (3) material consumption, (4) total savings (billion yuan converted to %), (2)+(3)=total consumption, (2)+(3)+(4)=residents' income, the numerical values show direct proportions. Right-axis curve: non-material consumption ratio, residents' consumption ratio (as a percentage of residents' income), the difference between the two is the material consumption ratio, the ratio of the two is the non-material consumption proportion (as a percentage of total consumption), the ratio of the difference to the residents' consumption ratio is the material consumption proportion. The provincial ranking of non-material consumption ratio and residents' consumption ratio is marked.
